title: Invasion of Fondor
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Battle of Fondor}} {{Citation}} {{Battle |prev=[[Assault on Thyferra]]''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' |conc= |next=[[Battle in the Ilum system]] |image=[[File:Fondor_Uprising.jpg]] |name=Invasion of Fondor |conflict=[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] |date=c. [[2 BBY/Legends|2 BBY]]{{EaW_2BBY}} |place=[[Fondor/Legends|Fondor]] |result=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] victory |side1=Galactic Empire |side2=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and local supporters |side3= |side4= |commanders1=[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] |commanders2=[[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kalast]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*[[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] **[[Scout trooper/Legends|Scout troopers]] *[[TIE ap-1]]s *[[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST walkers]] *[[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]] |forces2=*[[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Rebel troopers]] *5 [[T2-B Repulsor Tank/Legends|T2-B repulsor tanks]] *3 [[Infantry Support Platform/Legends|ISP speeders]] *Fondor civilians |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=*Light to medium **At least 1 squad of Stormtroopers and an All Terrain Scout Transport |casual2=*Most forces wiped out |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|My lord, reports are coming in from Fondor that rebel forces have been sabotaging our activities there. They have routed our troops and taken control of some local settlements.''"
"''This meaningless retaliation only serves to give away their location. We will eliminate them quickly and recover any communications you may find on the rubble.|An Imperial Officer and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]|}} The '''Invasion of Fondor''' was a battle which began as a riot during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. ==Background== While [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] forces based on [[Fondor/Legends|Fondor]] were distracted fighting [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] forces on [[Thyferra/Legends|Thyferra]], the treacherous [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kalast]] had his Rebels take control of many cities on the Imperial factory world. The local citizens began to riot and assisted the Rebels in taking down the factories. Without the planet, construction on many key Imperial ships would be shut down. Darth Vader's force on Thyferra had won their battle and quickly found out about the disaster back on Fondor. He sent an imperial force that penetrated Fondor's defenses and landed in [[Fondor City]]. Routing the local Rebel Alliance troops and supporters, the retrieval force moved through the city. ==The battle== Destroying civilian buildings claimed by the Alliance, the troops eventually captured an abandoned sensor array, where they were able to get intelligence and targeting information on the city. The main city plaza was raked with fire, where the Imperials bombed and destroyed factories captured by the Alliance. Most rebels were soon destroyed or scattered, leaving the stragglers to be executed. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|Fondor has been subjugated. Have you intercepted any information about our traitor?''"
"''We have deciphered encoded transmissions which were redirected several times, but eventually routed to Ilum.''"
"''The pirates' den, no doubt. Send a probe droid to confirm this…infestation.|Darth Vader and a stormtrooper|}} With the Fondor Uprising put down, [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] could once again concentrate his efforts on getting [[Kalast]]. Vader eventually hired [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] to venture to [[Ilum/Legends|Ilum]], where a pirate organization that supplied Kalast with weapons was found to be based. ==Behind the scenes== This battle was the second mission of the Imperial campaign in the [[2006]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Empire at War'': Prima Official Game Guide]] {{1stm}} *[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion'': Prima Official Game Guide]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW 2 BBY}} {{Interlang |de=Schlacht von Fondor (0 VSY) |es=Invasión de Fondor }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Fondor, Invasion of}} [[Category:Battles of Fondor]] [[Category:Battles of the Galactic Civil War]] [[Category:Invasions]] [[Category:Rebellions and uprisings]]
